heading: Tell us a bit about you
subheading: We'll follow up with the right next step. Fields marked * are required.

fields.name: Full name
fields.consent: I agree to be contacted about my request and have read the privacy note.

success.heading: Thanks — we got your request!
success.body: We'll reach out shortly with your next step. Prefer to talk now? Message us on WhatsApp.

error.heading: Something went wrong
error.body: Please try again, or contact us directly.
error.fallback: If this keeps happening, email us at {email} or message us on WhatsApp.

validation.name: Please enter your name.
validation.phone: Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.consent: Please agree to be contacted so we can help.

privacyNote: We only collect what we need to help you, and we never sell your information.
